title: Source allow-list schema + license-gate policy (cancer guardrails)
context: Before any source is ingested into the oncogene knowledge graph, a formal allow-list schema and license-gate policy must exist so that contributors and CI can enforce redistribution compliance. COSMIC, OncoKB, and DrugBank-NC are non-redistributable and must be categorically rejected. CC-BY-SA and CC-BY sources must be segregated from the CC0 core. This policy is the hard gate for all subsequent data-extraction tasks.
objective: Define the sources/allowlist.yml schema and the license-gate policy document covering: allowlist fields (source, custodian, version, URL, format, license, redistribution/derivatives terms, attribution obligations, status), categorical rejection rules for non-redistributable sources, and the per-release re-verification requirement.
acceptanceCriteria: sources/allowlist.yml schema captures: source name, custodian, version, URL, format, license basis, redistribution + derivatives terms, attribution/share-alike obligation, and status (approved|rejected|pending).
Policy text states COSMIC, OncoKB, and DrugBank-NC and any non-redistributable, controlled-access, or identifiable source are categorically rejected.
CC-BY-SA and CC-BY sources are designated for segregated overlays with their own license manifest separate from the CC0 core.
Per-version re-verification requirement is documented (licenses can change between releases).
Policy is published as a human-readable document and machine-readable YAML schema.
output: docs/license-policy.md and sources/allowlist.schema.yml defining the license-gate schema and cancer-guardrail policy, committed via PR.
